title: 3D Ender Dragon Fireball
description: This is a mod that updates the rendering of the game, to support the included 3D version of the fireball that's fired at you during the Dragon fight
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_pm-h7bPLBg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

I wanted to add a 3D replacement for the 2D sprite that the game uses for the Ender dragon_fireball texture/model. But I noticed that the game didn't have a way to use the model I created, even using mods such as [Entity Model Features(EMF)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features). So this mod is supposed to add rendering support to make the fireball 3D.



MAY NOT BE COMPATIBLE WITH [Particle Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-core)



Compatible with:

[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

[Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)

Many others. I personally have over 90+ client side mods installed and I observe no ongoing bugs in my testing.


If you find any bugs please do contact me via discord.
